zh.lifeSummary: Cicely Alicia Lovet是John Lovet的女兒，於1229年出生。她於1255年與Sir Ralph le Blount - Lord of Belton在英國盧特藍德貝爾頓 在 盧特藍德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1263年享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Cicely Alicia Lovet是John Lovet的女儿，于1229年出生。她于1255年与Sir Ralph le Blount - Lord of Belton在英国盧特藍德貝爾頓 在 盧特藍德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1263年享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lovet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Anglo-Norman French louet ‘wolf-cub’, a diminutive of lou ‘wolf’. The nickname may also have been used as a personal name. Compare Love , Lovell , Low .
from the Middle English female personal name Luvot or Lovet, pet forms of Love .

variants.name: Lovitt
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Lovett  .

variants.name: Love
meanings: English: from a Middle English personal name derived from the Old English female name Lufu ‘love’, or the masculine equivalent Lufa. Compare Leaf 2.

English and Scottish: nickname from Anglo-Norman French love ‘she-wolf’ or simply ‘wolf’, the word love being a back-formation from the diminutive forms lovel and lovet ‘little wolf’. See also Low 3, from Anglo-Norman French lou, the more usual form of the word.
Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhionghuin (see McKinnon ).

nameMeanings.name: Cicely
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

variants.name: Cecily
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

nameMeanings.name: Alicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisha
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisia
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

en.lifeSummary: Cicely Alicia Lovet was born in 1229 as the daughter of John Lovet. She married Sir Ralph le Blount - Lord of Belton in 1255, in Belton In Rutland, Rutland, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1263, at the age of 34.

ja.lifeSummary: Cicely Alicia Lovetは1229年にJohn Lovetの娘として生まれた。1255年にイギリスルトランドベルトン イン ルトランドでSir Ralph le Blount - Lord of Beltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1263年に34歳で死去した。

ko.Belton, Rutland, England: 영국 잉글랜드 루틀랜드 벨턴 인 루틀랜드

ko.lifeSummary: Cicely Alicia Lovet(은)는 1229년 John Lovet의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1255년 영국 루틀랜드 벨턴 인 루틀랜드에서 Sir Ralph le Blount - Lord of Belton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1263년 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Cicely Alicia Lovet родилась в 1229 г. Её отца звали John Lovet. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Ralph le Blount - Lord of Belton в 1255 г. в местности белтон ин рутланд, рутланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1263 г. в возрасте 34 лет.
